responsibilities: End-to-end Web Development for NanoRobotic website from concept to deployment.
Built custom WhatsApp API integration for contact forms and 'Join Now' features.
Engineered mobile-first responsive interfaces using Bootstrap, HTML5, and CSS3.
Implemented semantic HTML, meta-tag strategies, and asset optimization for SEO.
Conducted rigorous cross-browser testing and debugging.
Collaborated with design teams to refine UI/UX flows.
Optimized page performance and resolved front-end bugs.
Maintained IoT-driven automation systems integrating sensors and microcontrollers.
Assisted in monitoring solutions for system diagnostics and real-time reporting.
Built small-scale automation features like relay control and alert systems.
Performed hardware testing, calibration, and wiring validation.
